games.title: Neon Snake
games.description: Classic snake with a glowing neon twist. Eat, grow, don't bite yourself.

games.title: Brick Breaker
games.description: Smash every brick with a bouncing ball and a paddle that never quits.

games.title: Memory Match
games.description: Flip cards, find pairs, and train your brain against the clock.

games.title: Reaction Rush
games.description: How fast are you really? Click the moment the screen turns green.

games.title: Asteroid Dodger
games.description: Pilot your ship through an endless asteroid field. Survive as long as you can.

games.title: Tic Tac Bot
games.description: Tic-tac-toe against a bot that plays a mean game of X's and O's.
